---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working the way it should
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: [bug]
assignees: []
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Type / click '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the exact error message, if any.

## Sample `.ink` document

A minimal DSL document that reproduces the problem (please keep it as small as possible):

```ink
# paste your minimal reproducing document here
```

## Environment

- **OS:** <!-- e.g. macOS 14.5 / Windows 11 / Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- **Inkling version:** <!-- e.g. 0.1.0, or a commit SHA if building from source -->
- **Notation:** <!-- chen | crowsfoot | uml | idef1x | minmax -->
- **Install method:** <!-- installer (.dmg/.msi/.deb/.AppImage) | built from source | CLI -->

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or console/log output to help explain the problem.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help us understand the issue.
